name: Champion Pawn and Jewelry
description_short: Champion Pawn & Jewelry is a Baltimore-based pawn shop offering collateral loans, gold/jewelry buying, repairs, and resale merchandise since 1996.
description_long:
Champion Pawn & Jewelry has operated in the Hamilton neighborhood of northeast Baltimore City since 1996, positioning itself as Maryland's #1 rated pawn shop. The company serves customers seeking quick cash through collateral-based loans without credit checks, as well as those looking to sell jewelry and valuables.

The business offers three primary services: (1) cash collateral loans on items of value with no credit check required and same-day funding, (2) buying and selling of gold, jewelry, watches, electronics, tools, and instruments with competitive pricing, and (3) comprehensive jewelry repair services including resizing, stone setting, engraving, platinum work, and watch maintenance. Their retail inventory emphasizes savings of up to 70% compared to retail jewelry stores and big-box retailers.

Champion distinguishes itself through explicit transparency commitments—they state they will advise customers if better deals are available elsewhere and clearly disclose all flaws or defects on merchandise tags. They also offer ancillary services like notarization, faxing, and bus pass sales. Jewelry repairs include a six-month warranty, and all pieces are stored in high-security vaults during work.

The company's honest assessment reveals significant limitations: they are a pawn shop, not a lender of credit, meaning collateral is required and items may be forfeited. The website lacks specific loan amounts, APR/interest rates, loan terms, and redemption periods—critical details for consumers evaluating collateral loans. No physical address, hours, or detailed contact information beyond a phone number is provided. While they claim #1 rating in Maryland, no independent verification or review aggregator links are visible on the site.
pros: No credit check required for collateral loans—cash approved in minutes
Explicit commitment to transparency, including advising customers of better deals elsewhere
Comprehensive jewelry repair services with six-month warranty and secure vault storage
Competitive buying prices and up to 70% savings on resale merchandise vs. retail
Established 28+ year operating history (since 1996) in Baltimore market
Specializes in large collateral loans with stated competitive rates
Additional services like notarization, faxing, and bus pass sales
cons: Website does not disclose loan amounts, interest rates (APR), or loan term lengths—essential for evaluating affordability
No published physical address or business hours on website, only phone number provided
Collateral-based lending means customers risk losing items if unable to repay
#1 Maryland rating claim is unverified and no third-party review links provided
Watch battery replacement copy is cut off mid-sentence, indicating incomplete website information
best_for: Customers with jewelry, electronics, or tools who need immediate cash and cannot access traditional credit
People seeking to sell or pawn items quickly without credit approval
Jewelry owners needing professional repair services with clear pricing and warranties
diagnosis: Champion Pawn & Jewelry is best for Baltimore-area customers needing same-day cash via collateral loans or looking to sell jewelry/items quickly. The major caveat is that specific loan terms, rates, and maximum amounts are absent from their website, making it impossible to evaluate true affordability before contacting them directly at 410-254-1110.
services: Collateral-based cash loans without credit checks
Stone setting (tightening, channel set, bezel set, pavé set, bead set)
Watch battery replacement and band installation
Jewelry finishing (polishing, Rhodium plating, satin finish)
Clasp repair (spring rings, lobster claw, box clasp, barrel clasp)
Resale of used and new jewelry, electronics, tools, and instruments
Notarization, faxing, and bus pass sales
